name: @mindfoldhq/oh-my-openclaw
description: Better multi-agent collaboration and OpenClaw workflows.

scripts.release: pnpm prerelease && npm version patch && pnpm format && git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm prerelease && npm version minor && pnpm format && git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm prerelease && npm version major && pnpm format && git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push && git push --tags
